methods.description: Process for collecting pollen samples from stingless bee hives to study their pollen sources and trophic niche.

steps.description: The samples were collected monthly from pots, collecting only pollen accumulated from before the latest data collection.
steps.searchable_summary: collect monthly pollen samples from bee hives

methods.description: Preparation of pollen samples for microscopic analysis to identify pollen types and quantify pollen grains.

steps.description: Pollen grains were submitted to glacial acetic acid over slides for 5 minutes and after colored with toluidine blue.
steps.searchable_summary: treat pollen grains with glacial acetic acid and stain with toluidine blue

steps.description: Slides were mounted with Kaiser's gelatin and analyzed under bright field microscopy.
steps.searchable_summary: mount slides with Kaiser's gelatin and analyze under bright field microscopy

methods.description: Identification of pollen grains using catalogs and comparison with known plant species to aid in species identification.

steps.description: Identification was aided by catalogs and other specialized literature, as well as comparison with the pollen of known plant species observed in the surroundings of the hives.
steps.searchable_summary: identify pollen species using catalogs and comparison with known samples

methods.description: Analysis of trophic niche breadth using the Shannon index and similarity of pollen flora using the Jaccard and Morisita indices.

steps.description: Trophic niche breadth was measured with the Shannon index.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate Shannon index for trophic niche breadth

steps.description: The similarity of pollen flora among sites was analyzed with the Jaccard index, and among sites and bee species with the Morisita index.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate Jaccard and Morisita indices for pollen similarity

steps.description: A dendrogram of similarity was generated based on Morisita index.

methods.description: Estimation of the Mean Minimal Distance necessary to obtain the pollen for each bee species and month.

steps.description: An estimation of the Mean Minimal Distance necessary to obtain the pollen was obtained with the formula considering the distance from the nearest flowering specimen of the plant species.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate Mean Minimal Distance for pollen acquisition
